title: canarium pulchrebracteatum
intro: Canarium pulchrebracteatum, also known as the beautiful-fruited canarium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Burseraceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its bark, which is used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Canarium pulchrebracteatum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and reduce the risk of infection. In herbal preparations, the bark of the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
